description_long: This is a bulbous, narrow-necked vase with a flared rim, featuring a vibrant cloisonné-style enamel surface. The body is adorned with large, stylized floral motifs in red, blue, yellow, and white, set against a pale green background with leafy accents. The rim and base are metallic, likely brass or bronze, providing a contrasting frame to the colorful enamel work. The floral patterns are outlined in dark lines, giving a distinct, segmented appearance typical of cloisonné craftsmanship. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and enhancing the vividness of the colors. This decorative vase exudes an ornate, traditional aesthetic, suitable for display in refined urban or garden settings.
description: A glossy, cloisonné-style vase with vibrant floral motifs in red, blue, yellow, and white on a green background, featuring metallic rim and base. The surface is smooth and highly decorative, ideal for ornamental display.
description_view_0: This view highlights a large red and white flower at the center, surrounded by blue and yellow blossoms and green leaves.
description_view_1: This angle shows a prominent yellow flower and a red flower, with more blue and white floral accents visible on the sides.
description_view_2: Here, a large red flower dominates the center, flanked by yellow and blue flowers, with the floral pattern appearing denser.
description_view_3: This view features a central white flower, bordered by red and blue blossoms, with the green leafy background more prominent.
